title: Thinking (Vivek Buddhi)
description: Moving from memorization to independent thought and evaluating consequences.

title: Communication (Vak Shakti)
description: Mastering clear, confident expression and the art of active listening.

title: Technology (Digital Dharma)
description: Developing digital discipline and understanding AI as a tool rather than dependency.

title: Life Skills (Atma & Artha Bodh)
description: Building emotional resilience and ethical financial management.
